tasks.subject: Task 1: Route Group Scaffold + Design Tokens
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete app/page.tsx, create (marketing) and (surveys) route group stubs, and add --m-* design tokens to globals.css.

**Files:**
- Delete: `app/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/(marketing)/layout.tsx`
- Create: `app/(marketing)/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/(marketing)/framework/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/(marketing)/results/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/(marketing)/services/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/(marketing)/about/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/(marketing)/contact/page.tsx`
- Create: `app/(surveys)/layout.tsx`
- Create: `app/(surveys)/assessment/page.tsx`
- Modify: `app/globals.css`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] app/page.tsx deleted
- [ ] All route group directories and stub files created
- [ ] --m-* tokens in :root and @theme inline in globals.css
- [ ] npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build exits 0

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/globals.css", "app/(marketing)/layout.tsx", "app/(marketing)/page.tsx", "app/(surveys)/layout.tsx", "app/(surveys)/assessment/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["app/page.tsx deleted", "All route group directories and stub files created", "--m-* tokens in :root and @theme inline", "Build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Nav + Footer Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Build Nav.tsx (client component, scroll-aware, mobile hamburger) and Footer.tsx (server component), then update the marketing layout to use them.

**Files:**
- Create: `components/marketing/Nav.tsx`
- Create: `components/marketing/Footer.tsx`
- Modify: `app/(marketing)/layout.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Nav transparent at top, solid --m-bg-card after 60px scroll
- [ ] Mobile hamburger opens fullscreen overlay
- [ ] Active link highlighted via usePathname
- [ ] Footer renders logo/tagline/links/copyright
- [ ] Build passes

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["components/marketing/Nav.tsx", "components/marketing/Footer.tsx", "app/(marketing)/layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Nav scroll behavior correct", "Mobile hamburger works", "Active link highlighted", "Footer renders correctly", "Build passes"]}
```
